description: This customizable template is the perfect way to share information about Video Games Day celebrated on September 12th. There is plenty of customizable space to share photos, content, tournaments, and social media links. All BEE templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.
